title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Indigo Paints are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!
